summary.zh: 插件作者工作台,在 Studio 内编辑本地插件的可视化编辑器。它读写 .forgeax/plugins/<slug>/ 下的 L2 插件:左侧是文件树,右侧是文本编辑器,保存即写回并在后台热重载插件注册表,改完立刻生效。配合 fork 与 record-as-skill 创建新插件,让非工程师也能在应用内做、改、上自己的插件。
summary.en: The Plugin Author workbench — an in-app visual editor for local plugins. It reads and writes L2 plugins under .forgeax/plugins/<slug>/: a file tree on the left, a text editor on the right; saving writes back and hot-reloads the plugin registry in the background so changes apply at once. Paired with fork and record-as-skill to create new plugins, it lets non-engineers author, edit and ship plugins in-app.

body.zh:
编辑 .forgeax/plugins/<slug>/ 下本地插件
左文件树 + 右文本编辑器
保存即写回 + 后台热重载注册表
body.en:
Edit local plugins under .forgeax/plugins/<slug>/
Left file tree + right text editor
Save writes back + hot-reloads the registry

body.zh: 配合 fork / record-as-skill 创建插件,再在此编辑
body.en: Create with fork / record-as-skill, then edit here

notes.zh: 落地真实文件树 + 编辑器面板
